description: Cross-chain DeFi portfolio discovery, ranked rebalancing proposals, and unsigned NEAR Intent construction. Single tool with three operations: scan, propose, build_intent.

conditional_requirements: `propose` requires `positions` (output of `scan`) and `strategies` (list of strategy doc bodies).
notes: All operations are read-only and produce no signed payloads. The agent never holds private keys.
Scan supports historical queries via the optional `at` field (block per chain or timestamp).
In M1 the indexer only supports the `fixture` source. M2 adds Dune REST.
Use `tool_info(name: "portfolio", detail: "schema")` for the full schema before guessing fields.

auth.instructions: Create a Dune API key at dune.com/settings/api and paste it here. The fixture-mode tests work without a key.
auth.token_hint: Starts with a string of alphanumeric characters

required_secrets.name: dune_api_key
required_secrets.prompt: Dune Analytics API key (create one at dune.com/settings/api). Optional in fixture mode.
